data.name: Bioequivalence Analyzer
data.description: Analyzes bioequivalence study data by calculating pharmacokinetic parameters, performing statistical comparisons against reference products, and generating regulatory submission-ready reports with confidence intervals.
data.readme:
## Bioequivalence Analyzer

Analyzes bioequivalence study data by calculating pharmacokinetic parameters, performing statistical comparisons against reference products, and generating regulatory submission-ready reports with confidence intervals.

### Framework: Agno

### Tools
["PK Calculator","Statistical Comparator","Report Generator"]

### Tags
["bioequivalence","pk","generic","statistics"]
